title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Emeritus Global Group in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Emeritus Global Group:
Emeritus Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus Global Group!
